name: Korean-Style Cucumber Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cucumbers and onion into very fine slices using a food processor.
2. Sprinkle with salt, mix well, and set aside in a bowl for an hour.
3. Drain all the accumulated liquid and discard it.
4. Add the lemon juice, cayenne pepper (Koreans like this dish very hot), sesame seeds, and sesame oil. Mix well.
5. Cover and refrigerate. Serve cold or at room temperature.
